data.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | LLM-behavioral bug (Multi-Step Reasoning Drift #7). Sprint SKILL.md already has MANDATORY completion-verifier instructions at lines 966, 981, 1142 — orchestrator rationalizes around them. Fix requires editing skills/sprint/SKILL.md (safeguard file). Proposed fix: Add explicit HARD-GATE blocks around completion-verifier dispatch similar to fix-bug's HARD-GATE, plus a pre-closure checklist that must be satisfied before ticket transition commands execute. Re-run in interactive session to approve safeguard edits.
